'''wawazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zemstvo|zemstvo]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-w-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zemstvo|zemstvo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| wawazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæwæzhæth|wæwæzhæth]] || [[word:wæwæzhæj|wæwæzhæj]] || [[word:wæwæzhæsh|wæwæzhæsh]] || [[word:wæwæzhæ|wæwæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wawawazhath|wawawazhath]] || [[word:wawawazhaj|wawawazhaj]] || [[word:wawawazhash|wawawazhash]] || [[word:wawawazha|wawawazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wawazhath|wawazhath]] || [[word:wawazhaj|wawazhaj]] || [[word:wawazhash|wawazhash]] || [[word:wawazha|wawazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wawafzhath|wawafzhath]] || [[word:wawafzhaj|wawafzhaj]] || [[word:wawafzhash|wawafzhash]] || [[word:wawafzhaf|wawafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wawazhatha|wawazhatha]] || [[word:wawazhaja|wawazhaja]] || [[word:wawazhasha|wawazhasha]] || [[word:wawazhaka|wawazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wawazhath|wawazhath]] || [[word:wawazhaj|wawazhaj]] || [[word:wawazhash|wawazhash]] || [[word:wawazha|wawazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wawazhathal|wawazhathal]] || [[word:wawazhajal|wawazhajal]] || [[word:wawazhashal|wawazhashal]] || [[word:wawazhakal|wawazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wawazhathatha|wawazhathatha]] || [[word:wawazhajaja|wawazhajaja]] || [[word:wawazhashasha|wawazhashasha]] || [[word:wawazhaka|wawazhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wawazhathan|wawazhathan]] || [[word:wawazhajan|wawazhajan]] || [[word:wawazhashan|wawazhashan]] || [[word:wawazhakan|wawazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wawazhathaoro|wawazhathaoro]] || [[word:wawazhajaoro|wawazhajaoro]] || [[word:wawazhashaoro|wawazhashaoro]] || [[word:wawazhakaoro|wawazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
